playbook.intent: Journey map of friction -> ranked design-debt + design-bet tickets in backlog.
playbook.scope: Designer takes a journey map and converts friction into a prioritized backlog. Includes friction audit, debt vs bet split, RICE scoring, ticket creation, and rationale traceability. Done when ranked tickets are in the backlog and traceable to journey-map evidence.

success-criteria.criterion: Each item split into design-debt vs design-bet
Tickets in the product backlog with journey-map links

stage.name: Read the map
stage.decision-gate: Advance only when each friction has evidence.

stage.name: Service blueprint
stage.intent: Show the system behind the journey.

stage.name: Debt vs bet split
stage.intent: Sort known fixes vs experimental bets.

tasks.task: Mark each item as debt or bet
Document the difference live with team

stage.decision-gate: Advance only when every item has a label.

stage.name: RICE-for-design
stage.decision-gate: Advance only with ranked list reviewed.

stage.name: Tickets + trace

tasks.task: Link each ticket to journey-map evidence

stage.decision-gate: Done when tickets are linked and the queue is shared.

extra.value: [Bets disguised as debt -> sprint over-commits, RICE without consistent rubric -> ranking is theatre, Tickets without trace -> rationale lost in two months]
['Are debt vs bet labels honest?', 'Is the RICE rubric documented?', 'Can a new team-mate trace any ticket back to the map?']

{human: faion get-content journey-map-driven-attack-from-friction-map-to-ranked-design-backlog --format md, agent: faion get-content journey-map-driven-attack-from-friction-map-to-ranked-design-backlog --format context, json: faion get-content journey-map-driven-attack-from-friction-map-to-ranked-design-backlog --format json}
[{version: 1.0.0, date: 2026-05-20, note: Initial draft from F-059-063 chunk-05.}]
